title: Kernel orthestrationについて、codexだけでなくglmやclaudeとの協奏として設定されているか確認せよ
summary_text: - **Critical: smoke can pass on text shape only, not real active lanes.** Current check only requires 3 fixed strings plus `>=6` bullet-shaped lines; it does not verify lane liveness, distinct lane IDs/families, or successful lane outcomes. [fugue check](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh#L162) [feed-runner check](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh#L152) - **Critical: startup smoke is validating an upstream slash path, not the supported local production path.** Smoke runs `codex exec ... "/kernel"` directly, while contract says local authority is `kernel`/`codex-prompt-launch kernel` via guard. This can false-pass/false-fail with upstream slash behavior drift. [fugue smoke call](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh#L123) [contract local authority](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/CODEX.md#L51) [bare slash not SLO](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/CODEX.md#L58) - **High: provider diversity is not actually proven in smoke.** Smoke does not assert Claude/GLM presence or per-lane provider evidence; a Codex-only manifest can satisfy current regex checks. [fugue smoke assertions](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh#L163) [feed-runner smoke assertions](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh#L153) - **High: provider bootstrap precheck can false-ready.** Launcher precheck depends on `kernel-lane-bridge --check`; GLM/Claude availability there is mostly static capability/env presence (no live probe), so startup may be labeled “ready” without real callable diversity lanes. [launcher provider check](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-prompt-launcher/bin/codex-prompt-launch#L113) [bridge static GLM/Claude status](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/kernel-lane-bridge.mjs#L756) [check probes only codex-spark](/Users/masayuki/Dev/kernel-orchestration-tools/kernel-lane-bridge.mjs#L918) - **Medium: stale evidence risk is not excluded by startup verification.** The startup smoke has no session-scoped evidence reconciliation; elsewhere provider evidence uses a 60-minute global window, which can admit prior-session signals. [recent evidence window](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py#L505) [provider presence check](/Users/masayuki/Dev/tools/codex-kernel-guard/src/codex_kernel_guard/task_backup.py#L540) - **Medium: runtime smoke is opt-in, so routine “green” can be static-only.** If `RUN_CODEX_KERNEL_SMOKE` is unset, you only get wording checks, not live startup behavior. [fugue smoke gate](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh#L109) [feed-runner smoke gate](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-feed-runner/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh#L99)
